---
id: install-mender-plugin-for-1-nce-os
title: "Install Mender plugin for 1NCE OS"
description: "Allows setting up an integration with Mender to allow seamless firmware update management via 1NCE OS CoAP proxy. Public and private keys are optional fields, but if they are used, both must be provided"
sidebar_label: "Install Mender plugin for 1NCE OS"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/1nce-os/1-nce-os
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Install Mender plugin for 1NCE OS"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/partners/MENDER/plugins"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Allows setting up an integration with Mender to allow seamless firmware update management via 1NCE OS CoAP proxy. Public and private keys are optional fields, but if they are used, both must be provided

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
